content: @Miguel Ojeda mentioned a few times a new build system that will help us - what is this going to look like, and is there a WIP somewhere?
I am assuming this is a rust-specific change and not a whole-kernel build system change
I will let you know when I have something, if you are interested (there will be a lot of things to do).

I was mostly just curious what the new design does or looks like, after seeing @Martin Rodriguez Reboredo's https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/ca2cd71c-0aa1-4365-961c-c10737a9e9a6@gmail.com/T/#m44915f4a18ba9f2b033e186690d964ef8da3e965. But wasn't sure if this already existed on a branch or is just in outline phase

Miguel Ojeda said:

I will let you know when I have something, if you are interested (there will be a lot of things to do).

I am @Miguel Ojeda so please keep me in the look and let me know in any way I can help :)
I did be interested in taking a look once you have something too.
